title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Senior Teacher in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!
